command: for day in 12 13 14; do echo '=== April $day ==='; LOG=~/Documents/Projects/AetherBot/Logs/AetherBot_2026-04-$day.txt; echo 'NEW TICKERS:'; grep -c 'NEW TICKER |' $LOG; echo 'HARVEST DONE:'; grep -c 'HARVEST DONE' $LOG; echo 'STOPLOSS:'; grep -c 'STOPLOSS\|STOP.LOSS\|stop_loss' $LOG; echo 'POS WARNING:'; grep -c 'POS WARNING' $LOG; echo '--- Harvests ---'; grep 'HARVEST DONE' $LOG | head -10; echo '--- Balance at start ---'; grep 'bal \$' $LOG | head -1; echo '--- Balance at end ---'; grep 'bal \$' $LOG | tail -1; echo '--- Errors ---'; grep -i 'error\|ERROR\|Error' $LOG | tail -3; echo ''; done 2>&1
